title: Crispy Peruvian Chicken Salad
description: A refreshing salad with crispy fried chicken, mixed greens, and a zesty Peruvian dressing.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together citrusy vinaigrette, crushed black pepper, and chopped dates.
2. Add mixed greens, romaine lettuce, red onion, and croutons to the bowl.
3. In a separate pan, heat 1-2 tablespoons of oil over medium-high heat.
4. Add chicken breasts to the pan and cook until golden brown and crispy.
5. Once fried, place the chicken on top of the salad.
6. Toss the salad to combine all the ingredients.
7. Season with additional citrusy vinaigrette to taste.
9. Garnish with chopped cilantro or parsley, if desired.
10. Refrigerate leftovers for up to 3 days.
